overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person motorcycle driving through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The player navigates through heavy traffic, tunnels, and intersections with holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with holographic advertisements

events.description: accelerating from underpass into open neon-lit street
weaving between slower vehicles in moderate traffic
approaching first major intersection with crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: riding a red motorcycle at high speed through neon-lit city streets, weaving between traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane
white sports car overtaking on the right side

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning the road above
tall building facade covered in bright pink and blue holographic advertisements
futuristic glass tower with illuminated windows rising above the street
concrete divider with yellow safety strip separating lanes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person motorcycle view emerging from under a concrete overpass into a dazzling neon-lit commercial district. The rider weaves through moderate traffic, passing holographic advertisements on towering glass skyscrapers while navigating toward an intersection with yellow crosswalk markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional urban corridor with alternating open and covered sections

events.description: entering darker shadowed section beneath large overpass
navigating through intersection with broad yellow crosswalk stripes
approaching entrance to covered tunnel with vertical lighting

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed while navigating intersections and passing under urban overpasses

notable_agents.action: green sports car passing on the left side of the motorcycle

entered.detail: tall palm tree visible against the building backdrop
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing painted across the road
dark tunnel opening with illuminated edges and signage

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle transitions through a mixed urban environment, passing from open neon-lit streets into shadowed areas beneath overpasses. The rider crosses a broad yellow-striped intersection while palm trees become visible on the right, approaching a tunnel entrance with distinctive vertical lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed urban tunnel with vertical lighting strips and red banners

events.description: entering fully enclosed tunnel section with artificial lighting
passing under bright vertical light strips illuminating the tunnel
overtaking a slower blue vehicle within the tunnel

agents.ego_description: speeding through enclosed tunnel sections with artificial lighting, passing other vehicles

notable_agents.action: blue compact car driving ahead in the tunnel before being overtaken

entered.detail: tall illuminated strips lining the tunnel walls and ceiling
large red vertical banners with white symbols hanging from the tunnel ceiling
rough concrete walls showing wear and graffiti markings

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a fully enclosed tunnel environment, transitioning from neon-lit streets to artificial lighting. The rider passes distinctive red hanging banners and bright vertical light strips while overtaking a blue compact car, with rough concrete walls enclosing the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level transport hub with graffiti art and structural columns

events.description: exiting tunnel into covered parking and transport infrastructure
passing walls covered in colorful graffiti murals and street art
navigating around parked vehicles and concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: navigating through covered transport infrastructure with graffiti-covered walls and structural columns

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking along the right sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful street art and murals
large red structural column with attached signage
illuminated sign with lane directions and symbols hanging from ceiling

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the motorcycle enters a covered transport hub featuring colorful graffiti murals on concrete walls. The rider navigates past structural columns and overhead directional signage while a pedestrian in red walks along the sidewalk, transitioning from enclosed tunnel to semi-open infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with heavy neon signage and crosswalks

events.description: exiting covered structure back to open neon-lit street
crossing large intersection with yellow zebra striping

agents.ego_description: accelerating through final intersection with bright neon advertisements visible on surrounding buildings

entered.detail: bright red and yellow billboard with animated text and graphics

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the motorcycle emerging from the covered transport hub back into the open neon-lit cityscape. The rider accelerates across a broad yellow-striped intersection, with bright holographic advertisements and towering glass skyscrapers visible against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person motorcycle journey that transitions from a dazzling neon commercial district into a shadowed urban corridor leading toward a tunnel. It begins by emerging from beneath a concrete overpass into a vibrant cityscape, weaving through moderate traffic beneath towering glass skyscrapers and holographic advertisements. As the rider navigates toward a broad intersection with yellow crosswalk markings, the brilliant city lights begin to give way to deeper shadows. The scene then shifts through a mixed urban environment where palm trees appear on the right, before the camera finally glides toward a tunnel entrance characterized by distinctive vertical lighting.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a motorcycle travels from a confined industrial tunnel into the expansive, neon-lit heart of a futuristic city. It begins within a fully enclosed tunnel, passing red hanging banners and vertical light strips while overtaking a blue compact car against rough concrete walls. As the rider exits the tunnel, the environment shifts into a semi-open transport hub characterized by colorful graffiti murals, structural columns, and overhead signage. The scene then opens further as the motorcycle emerges from the covered infrastructure and accelerates across a broad yellow-striped intersection. Finally, the view expands to reveal a towering cityscape of glass skyscrapers and bright holographic advertisements glowing against the night sky.
